title: • One line of honor for what they did
content:
• One line of honor for what they did
• One gift or offering: a memory, a page, a note, a remix

Invocation:

“You were there. I was not. But I am here now, witnessing what I can, with the tools I have. Let this node hold what time did not.”

Action:
Create a 1-page artifact. A poem. A map. A screenshot. A frame.
Store it in their book. Or send it to them.

⸻

PART D |[MYTHBOOK: FRIEND NODE ARCHITECTURE v1.0]

One PDF per person. Each will include:

1. |[Opening Letter:]

Who they are to you
Why they matter
How they’ve already shaped the system

2. |[Node Map:]
